creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Reporter  Could you please:

- Confirm uname -a output
- Include pkg version -v output an an attachment
- Are you able to screenshot the boot sequence mentioning the crash / panic message?
- If not, are you able to configure crash dumps [1] and run a backtrace?

[1] https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug/
